basic_details.job_title: Lakshmibai College Delhi Non-Teaching Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 24 Assistant, Junior Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Lakshmibai College Delhi has officially released a recruitment notification for Non-Teaching Staff. For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for all posts is generally around 32 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as follows: SC/ST: 5 years OBC (NCL): 3 years PwD: 10 years PwD + OBC (NCL): 13 years PwD + SC/ST: 15 years Ex-servicemen commissioned Officers including ECO/SSCOS: 5 years Permanent Employee Government department/Statutory Autonomous bodies/Universities/Affiliated or constituent college under the university/public sector undertakings: 5 years or number of years (in completed years) whichever is less, provided they have rendered at least three years regular service. Department candidates of University of Delhi and its colleges: Upper age limit shall not be insisted upon. Persons who are already working on contract/daily wages/ad-hoc basis in the University of Delhi or its college(s): Upper age limit will be relaxed to the extent of service rendered by them in the University of Delhi or its colleges provided they have put in at least one year of service.

all_official_links.label: Lakshmibai College Delhi Non-Teaching Staff Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies available in Lakshmibai College Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Lakshmibai College Delhi has announced a total of 24 vacancies for various Non-Teaching Staff posts.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply online for Lakshmibai College Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form is 01 July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. When did the online application process begin?
faq.answer: The online application process started on 11 June 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What are the posts available under this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment includes Librarian, Assistant, Lab Assistant, Junior Assistant, Library Attendant, and Lab Attendant posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the qualification required for the Junior Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree from a recognized university along with the required typing speed and computer proficiency.

faq.question: Q6. What is the qualification required for the Library Attendant post?
faq.answer: Candidates should have passed 10+2 or equivalent and possess a Certificate Course in Library Science from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: Unreserved category candidates are required to pay an application fee of ₹1,000.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee exemption for women candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the maximum age limit for Lakshmibai College Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for most posts is generally 32 years, with age relaxation available for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q10. Where can candidates apply for Lakshmibai College Delhi Non-Teaching Staff Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official website of Lakshmibai College Delhi before the closing date.
